overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features operational navigation monitors displaying radar and charts, with occasional lightning illuminating the rough ocean waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy night seas

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems from the bridge, monitoring radar and charts while proceeding through rough seas

entered.detail: left screen displaying nautical chart with yellow landmasses
circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep arm
right screen showing blue data display
metal window frame structure of the ship's bridge
red-painted forward deck of the vessel extending into the ocean
metal safety railing on the left side of the bow
metal safety railing on the right side of the bow
rough dark water with visible whitecaps and wave motion

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through rough stormy seas at night. Three navigation monitors are visible overhead displaying charts and radar, while the bow cuts through choppy dark waters visible through the forward windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge during active lightning storm

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean and sky on the port side through the bridge windows

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm as lightning strikes nearby, briefly illuminating the surrounding waters

entered.detail: bright white electrical discharge striking the ocean surface on the port side

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through the storm as a bright lightning bolt strikes the water on the port side, briefly illuminating the rough seas and dark clouds. The radar continues its sweep overhead while the vessel maintains its forward progress through the treacherous waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open stormy waters

agents.ego_description: continuing steady navigation through the storm, monitoring instruments as the ship progresses through rough seas

segments.scene_description: The vessel maintains its course through the ongoing storm with consistent forward motion. The bridge remains illuminated by the navigation monitors as the ship's bow continues to cut through the choppy dark waters, with no other vessels or landmarks visible in the open sea.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy ocean. It begins with the vessel moving steadily through choppy waters, with the glow of three overhead navigation monitors casting light over the radar and charts. As the ship maintains its forward progress, a sudden, bright lightning bolt strikes the water on the port side, momentarily illuminating the rough seas and heavy dark clouds. The scene then settles back into the dim light of the bridge as the vessel continues its course through the open sea. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the bow cutting through the treacherous waves, with the rhythmic sweep of the radar continuing amidst the isolation of the storm.
